localizations.title: The Song of the Sea Spray
localizations.hiddenObject_2: Where is the giant tree within the forest?
localizations.hint_101: If the finch joins the other birds, something will appear.
localizations.hint_234_first: The gazes of the finch (V) and the carp (6) connect through the current line in the river.
localizations.hint_234: Overlay card 6 onto card V to connect the gazes of the bird and the fish.
localizations.hint_333: Determine the upcoming time of departure, which is quickly approaching.
localizations.hint_6_first: The gazes of the finch (V) and the carp (6) connect through the current line in the river.
localizations.hint_6: Overlay card 6 onto card V to connect the gazes of the bird and the fish.
localizations.hint_52_first: The reflections in the water droplets above the river will help you determine where the bird went.
localizations.hint_52: You can see the bird in the reflections, but their positions are in reverse order.
localizations.hint_20_first: The reflections in the water droplets above the river on card 52 will help you determine where the bird went.
localizations.hint_20: You can see the bird in the reflections, but their positions are in reverse order.
localizations.hint_41: You have already seen the correct fish during your adventure.
localizations.hint_24: The finch is looking for a large tree in the forest.
localizations.hint_16: This tree's bark looks nice and soft!
localizations.hint_40: Look at the message from another viewpoint to understand its true meaning.
localizations.hint_421_first: Press the bird in the app to hear it sing, and use the song to find the value of this card.
localizations.hint_421: The bird's song consists of high-pitched and low-pitched notes in sequences of one to three.
localizations.hint_78_first: Move the fish from bubble to bubble while avoiding obstacles.
localizations.hint_78: Once the fish has completed the path, carefully examine the shape formed by the bubbles.
localizations.hint_94_first: Follow the conversation between the bird and the fish to assemble the cards properly.
localizations.hint_94: By placing cards 29, 30, 37, and 94, you will create a large scene representing their dance.
localizations.hint_29_first: Follow the conversation between the bird and the fish to assemble the cards properly.
localizations.hint_29: By placing cards 29, 30, 37, and 94, you will create a large scene representing their dance.
localizations.hint_30_first: Follow the conversation between the bird and the fish to assemble the cards properly.
localizations.hint_30: By placing cards 29, 30, 37, and 94, you will create a large scene representing their dance.
localizations.hint_37_first: Follow the conversation between the bird and the fish to assemble the cards properly.
localizations.hint_37: By placing cards 29, 30, 37, and 94, you will create a large scene representing their dance.
localizations.hint_7_first: The finch and the carp must each avoid the obstacles in order to leave the card, both within their respective worlds.
localizations.hint_7: What shape do each of their paths take?
localizations.hint_85_first: Card 85 can interact with the introductory cards. Gently slide card 85 behind the sea depicted in the initial scenery to see the sun begin to set. Do you notice anything?
localizations.hint_85: As the sun sets, the birds point to letters at the top the initial scene formed by the initial cards (1 and introduction).
localizations.hint_57: The scenery on this card resembles that found on the cards placed at the start of the adventure.
localizations.hint_machine_85_part1: You can use your device to scan a card with the same number as the one displayed on the screen.
localizations.hint_machine_85_part2_first: In the app, the heart will help you retrace the path each animal must take.
localizations.hint_machine_85_part2: Using the screen, move each animal toward its objective, as described in the text.
localizations.answer_hint_101: When the finch joins the other birds, their formation looks like a V.
localizations.answer_hint_234: Place card 6 onto card V so that a current's line connects the eyes of the bird and the fish. When you do, the pattern in the river's current will form the number 52.
localizations.answer_hint_333: When you look at the clocktower, you'll see that it's almost 6 o'clock.
localizations.answer_hint_6: Place card 6 onto card V so that a current's line connects the eyes of the bird and fish. When you do, the pattern in the river's current will form the number 52.
localizations.answer_hint_52: By observing the reflections in the water droplets, you can see that the bird has flown towards a location that contains, from left to right, a tower, a house, and a tree. Select this location and press OK.
localizations.answer_hint_20: By observing the reflections in the water droplets, you can see that the bird has flown towards a location that contains, from left to right, a tower, a house, and a tree. Select this location and press OK.
localizations.answer_hint_41: On the back of each card, you can see the fish that the bird fell in love with; it has a white circle around its eye, a black spot on its side, and three white lines on its tail. When you join the bird (41) with the correct fish (+16), they combine as follows: 41 + 16 = 57.
localizations.answer_hint_24: The tree you need is denoted by a hidden "16" on card 57. Take card 16 and combine it with card 24.
localizations.answer_hint_16: The bird (24) is looking for a tree on which to engrave a message. Combine the bird (24) with the tree (16). 16 + 24 = 40.
localizations.answer_hint_421: By pressing the bird in the app once, you can hear its song, which is comprised of one low note followed by two high notes. When you press it a second time, you will hear a single high note. On the third press, you will hear two low-pitched notes. On the "?" card, the small hearts correspond to the high-pitched notes, while the larger hearts correspond to the lower-pitched notes. Using this information, the song translates to 11 + 30, making the "?" card's value a red +41. You can add this to the fish's path of bubbles.
localizations.answer_hint_78: Using cards 78 and 4 as a guide to the location of the bubbles, connect them while avoiding the obstacles. Move the fish following this path: right, up, left, up, right, right, downard-left, downward-right, downward-left. This forms number 53. Combine +53 with the result of the bird's song.
localizations.answer_hint_94: Place card 29 vertically. Then place card 94 horizontally to the left of card 29, near the top. Place card 30 horizontally beneath card 29. Finally, place card 37 vertically beneath card 30. Together, the cards should create a single scene in the shape of the number 7.
localizations.answer_hint_29: Place card 29 vertically. Then place card 94 horizontally to the left of card 29, near the top. Place card 30 horizontally beneath card 29. Finally, place card 37 vertically beneath card 30. Together, the cards should create a single scene in the shape of the number 7.
localizations.answer_hint_30: Place card 29 vertically. Then place card 94 horizontally to the left of card 29, near the top. Place card 30 horizontally beneath card 29. Finally, place card 37 vertically beneath card 30. Together, the cards should create a single scene in the shape of the number 7.
localizations.answer_hint_37: Place card 29 vertically. Then place card 94 horizontally to the left of card 29, near the top. Place card 30 horizontally beneath card 29. Finally, place card 37 vertically beneath card 30. Together, the cards should create a single scene in the shape of the number 7.
localizations.answer_hint_7:
The only path the bird can take to avoid the obstacles above forms a red 23. The only path the fish can take to avoid the obstacles in the water forms a blue 62.
23 + 62 = 85
localizations.answer_hint_85: Gently slide card 85 behind the scene on the initial cards (1 and introduction). You will see the birds point to the letters "P", "R", "ESS", and "MOON". Press the moon icon, which is visible within the app.
localizations.answer_hint_57: Overlay card 57 on top of the initial scenery to reveal the number 78.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_85_part2: Press the white heart to view the bird's path. To reconstruct the yellow path displayed on your device, assemble cards 44, 96, 97, 98, and 99. Using your finger, guide the bird to the flower. Do the same with the fish, pressing the orange heart and guiding the fish to the shell. This will cause two paths to appear that lead to the red heart. The bird and the fish must then both reach the red heart simultaneously.
localizations.machine_20:
Enamored, the carp pursues their new love;
While the finch skims the water, lost up above.
localizations.machine_85:
And as these two lovers in happiness dwell 
The wind and the sea are united as well.
The finch and the carp, together will stay;
From this unlikely love comes the Song of the Sea Spray.
localizations.machine_85_intro:
The sun quickly sets, giving way to the night.
Yet more we must do for us to unite.
localizations.machine_85_early:
The birds and the sun sink behind the great sea;
Where are you, my love? I'm lost as can be!
